heading: Grants for AIDS housing information and coordination services
label: 12906 Grants for AIDS housing information and coordination services
notes: Amendments1992—Pars. (1), (2). substituted “eligible persons” for “individuals with acquired immunodeficiency syndrome or related diseases”.Pub. L. 102–550
amendments: Amendments1992—Pars. (1), (2). substituted “eligible persons” for “individuals with acquired immunodeficiency syndrome or related diseases”.Pub. L. 102–550

children.heading: Housing information services
children.label: 1 Housing information services
children.text: To provide (or contract to provide) counseling, information, and referral services to assist eligible persons to locate, acquire, finance, and maintain housing and meet their housing needs.

children.heading: Resource identification
children.label: 2 Resource identification
children.text: To identify, coordinate, and develop housing assistance resources (including conducting preliminary research and making expenditures necessary to determine the feasibility of specific housing-related initiatives) for eligible persons.
